untranslatable_reason: Measure Rule for Chart Patterns requires manual identification of formation highest high and trend-line price, then calculation of formation height as a dynamic offset. This involves identifying visual support/resistance levels and calculating custom price targets (trend_line - formation_height, and trend_line - formation_height/2) that cannot be expressed as fixed indicator thresholds. The pattern is fundamentally based on manual chart pattern geometry rather than quantifiable indicator conditions. Entry requires subjective pattern recognition (highest high, trend-line identification), and exit targets are calculated from pattern geometry rather than indicator values.
